clips.title: The Study
clips.prompt: Pencil sketch style, graphite drawing, hand-drawn linework, cross-hatching, loose gestural lines, sketchbook, mostly monochrome. Present day. A quiet artist's studio, a stool, a draped cloth, soft light, sketched loosely. Afternoon. A person in casual clothes sits on the stool in a relaxed seated pose, hands on knees, calm. Sketched folds of cloth, hatched shadows, a plant. Soft graphite shading, paper white highlights. Slow dolly in. Gestural pencil-sketch aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Cafe Corner
clips.prompt: Pencil sketch style, graphite drawing, hand-drawn linework, cross-hatching, loose gestural lines, sketchbook, mostly monochrome. Present day. A cozy cafe corner sketched loosely, a small round table, a window, hatched shadows. Afternoon. A person in casual clothes sits at the table with a coffee, chin on hand, looking out the window. A sketched cup, a saucer, a menu. Soft graphite tones, hatched shading. Slow dolly in. Relaxed pencil-sketch aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Street Scene
clips.prompt: Pencil sketch style, graphite drawing, hand-drawn linework, cross-hatching, loose gestural lines, sketchbook, mostly monochrome. Present day. A loosely sketched city street, leaning buildings, a lamppost, hatched pavement, quick gestural crowd. Day. A person in a coat walks along the sketched street with a bag, mid-stride, glancing ahead. Sketched storefronts, a bicycle, birds. Graphite line and hatching, paper highlights. Side tracking. Lively pencil-sketch aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Pose
clips.prompt: Pencil sketch style, graphite drawing, hand-drawn linework, cross-hatching, loose gestural lines, sketchbook, mostly monochrome. Present day. A stool, an easel, hatched floor shadow. Graphite gesture lines, soft shading. Slow orbit. Classical pencil-sketch aesthetic, 24fps.

Sweeping pencil-sketch aesthetic, 24fps.
